name: Velvet Rose Radiance Cream
description: An ultra-hydrating, luxurious cream infused with rare rose extracts that melts into the skin for a luminous, youthful glow.

name: Lumière Liquid Gold Serum
description: A concentrated anti-aging serum packed with 24k gold flakes and active peptides to restore firmness and elasticity.

name: Noir Silk Eye Elixir
description: Revitalize your under-eye area with this cooling, silk-infused elixir designed to banish dark circles and fine lines.

name: Obsidian Detoxifying Mask
description: A deeply purifying clay mask formulated with volcanic ash and active botanicals for a flawless, clear complexion.
